godot_contract_refs.section: Stable IDs, tombstones, mechanism traceability, and generated coverage
P2 mechanism, ID, trace, coverage, and presentation cue contracts

known_ambiguities: The clean DirectorTaskID source is structural evidence for a typed integer identifier and an explicit invalid sentinel only; it is not a behavioral or numeric oracle for this registry.

Append-only allocation, tombstone retention, scoped ID domains, aliases, presentation tags, payload schemas, and cue semantics are reviewed Godot contracts and project decisions rather than source-derived behavior.
This work item intentionally authors no gameplay IDs, mechanism values, payload definitions, or presentation cues; those records require later evidence-bound work items and synthetic fixtures.
